$comment: skyphusion-monitor probe inventory (monitor#42). Adding/changing a surface is an edit HERE (validated in CI by tests/config.test.ts, shipped by the push-to-main deploy) -- never a src/ edit. Schema: src/validate.ts CheckConfig. Inventory grounded in the live CF API pull + anonymous probes 2026-07-18: worker custom domains, Access apps, DNS. Deliberately absent: monitor.skyphusion.org (self-probe is circular; internal Gatus polls /health), hooks-* doorbell endpoints (crew-bus delivery accounting owns that signal; transport rethink crew-bus#40), imap./smtp. (TCP, fleet Gatus lane), rockenhaus.org (parked zone, no live surface).

checks.name: status-gatus
checks.note: public status board by design (fc#465); push API stays GATUS_PUSH_TOKEN gated

checks.name: grid-hub-door
checks.note: public federation info page at root; worlds bind GRID via RPC. workers.dev stays OFF (see F1.grid-hub-workersdev)

checks.name: common-thread-backend
checks.note: root serves a public status JSON by design (name/version/status only)

checks.name: studio-shell
checks.note: public app shell; the API self-auths (AUTH.studio-controlplane.api)

checks.name: rockenhaus-net
checks.note: public court-record site (CF Pages)

checks.name: github-pages
checks.note: org GitHub Pages brand home

checks.name: analytics-tracker
checks.note: Umami tracker path is Access-BYPASSED by design (sites break without it); the dashboard root is gated (F2.analytics-access)

checks.name: search-mcp-alive
checks.note: worker-alive tripwire: the API is POST/tool-shaped, anon GET / correctly 404s as JSON; a 5xx/timeout = worker down

checks.name: F1.vivijure-workersdev.cast
checks.note: workers_dev must stay OFF; serving = F1 regression

checks.name: F1.vivijure-workersdev.modules
checks.note: workers_dev must stay OFF; serving = F1 regression

checks.name: F1.grid-hub-workersdev
checks.note: grid-hub workers.dev must stay OFF; the custom domain is the only door

checks.name: F1.prism-workersdev
checks.note: play.* is the Access-gated door; workers.dev serving = Access bypass on an AI-spend surface

checks.name: F2.vivijure-access.cast
checks.note: 302=Access-login / 401/403 = blocked (healthy); 200+data = Access opened up

checks.name: F2.vivijure-access.modules
checks.note: anon must be Access-blocked; 200+data = Access opened up

checks.name: F2.chatplus-access
checks.note: 302=Access-login (healthy); 200/OpenWebUI markup = Access gate dropped (denial-of-wallet surface)

checks.name: F2.play-access
checks.note: 302=Access-login (healthy); 200/prism markup = Access gate dropped on an AI-spend surface

checks.name: F2.chat-access
checks.note: 302=Access-login (healthy); 200/OpenWebUI markup = Access gate dropped

checks.name: F2.search-access
checks.note: SearXNG behind the Access service-token app (fc#795); 200/instance markup = gate dropped on an open scraping proxy

checks.name: F2.analytics-access
checks.note: dashboard must stay Access-gated; the tracker/collect paths alone are bypassed by design

checks.name: F2.grafana-access
checks.note: 302=Access-login (healthy); 200/Grafana login = gate dropped on the metrics board

checks.name: AUTH.email-inbound.messages
checks.note: email API must require a token; 200 = mailbox exposure. 404 = workers.dev disabled, also healthy

checks.name: AUTH.postern-domain.messages
checks.note: custom-domain twin of AUTH.email-inbound.messages; 200 = mailbox exposure

checks.name: AUTH.slate-search.root
checks.note: workers_dev is intentionally ON (pinned, slate#57) because the worker self-authenticates; 200+results = auth regression. Replaces the retired vivijure-search check (worker deleted 2026-07-03)

checks.name: AUTH.sidvicious-search.root
checks.note: workers_dev intentionally ON (pinned, SidVicious_exe#12); self-authenticates; 200+results = auth regression

checks.name: AUTH.search-internal.mcp
checks.note: internal search MCP is bearer-gated; 200 = the internal corpus (fleet-chezmoi, crew-secrets docs) is open

checks.name: AUTH.studio-mcp.vivijure
checks.note: studio MCP door self-auths; 200 = control-plane tools open

checks.name: AUTH.studio-mcp.propagandhi

checks.note: control-plane API self-auths (public shell at / is intended); 200+data = auth regression

checks.name: AUTH.bus-internal.poll
